Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are going to create two POWL models as described

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the data is complete we have SkillAssessment Then we have an XOR branch the biased one that branches to either CulturalFitCheck standard path or CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage After the cultural fit community check we have ManagerialReview Finally FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: So the model is sequential with a loop at the beginning and an XOR in the middle

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Model 2 Without unfairness Same steps but without the XOR branch So after the skill assessment we only have the CulturalFitCheck and then proceed to managerial review and final decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We will create the activities as Transition objects with labels

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For the loop in the beginning we can model it as The loop will have two children child1 a sequence of DataCompletenessCheck and if incomplete then RequestMoreInfo but note that the loop condition is that we have to keep looping until the data is complete

Name: Validation - IND
Text: But note the loop operator in pm4py is defined as Operator LOOP meaning you do the first child A then you decide to do the second child B and then A again until you decide to stop

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can use loop equals OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We assume that when the data is complete we break the loop so we do not do the second child So the model for the initial part is ReceiveApplication then initial loop then SkillAssessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with potential unfairness Steps ReceiveApplication Then a loop DataCompletenessCheck and if not complete then RequestMoreInfo and then repeat DataCompletenessCheck Then SkillAssessment Then an XOR CulturalFitCheck OR CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage Then ManagerialReview Then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness Same steps except after SkillAssessment we only have CulturalFitCheck and then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will model the XOR in model1 as xor branch equals OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the entire model is a strict partial order that sequences ReceiveApplication initial loop SkillAssessment xor branch ManagerialReview FinalDecision
